output.dependency: The text identifier in column 1 appears to be associated with the structured flight code in column 2. In the sample, different text values map to the same flight code, suggesting column 2 may represent the underlying flight route/service while column 1 is a related label, source, or alias for it.

The structured code in column 2 appears to determine the time in column 4. The repeated code 'UA-62-IAH-EWR' is paired with the same time '2:48 p.m.', suggesting this code includes or identifies a specific scheduled departure time.

The structured code in column 2 appears to determine the time in column 6. The repeated code 'UA-62-IAH-EWR' is paired with the same time '7:10 p.m.', suggesting this code includes or identifies a specific scheduled arrival time.

The two time columns appear semantically linked as parts of the same itinerary or schedule record: one looks like a departure time and the other an arrival time for the same flight/service. Their meanings are jointly determined by the same transportation event.
